titleStmt.title: Letter from the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland, to the Branch Medical Council, 23 December 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Clerk, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland (RCPI) to the Branch Medical Council naming the newly admitted licentiates in medicine and midwifery.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: Clerk, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
23 DECEMBER 15. The Registrar,
Branch Medical Council,
Dublin. Dear Sir, I beg to inform you that at a meeting of this College
held yesterday the following were duly admitted Licentiates
in Medicine and Midwifey of the College :— Michael Burke, Main street, Longford.
Lawrence Lionel Davys, 32 Chelmsford Road, Ranelagh.
Maurice Victor de Caestecker, Ypres,Belgium.
John Arthur Fretton 8 Fortfield terr., Up. Rathmines.
Daniel Lane Kelly, Newcastle West, Co.Limerick.
Thomas Francis Moran, Listowel, Co.Kerry.
Vincent Augustine Power, Borrisoleigh, Co.Tipperary.
Cecil William Clements Robinson, 13 Harcourt-street.
James Ryan, Bridge-street, Westport, Co.Mayo. I remain, Dear Sir,
Yours faithfully,
Fellow & Registrar.
